requirements.full_sentence:
Short Title and Commencement
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative
<image>
Banks - Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Rural Co-operative <image> Banks - Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall become effective from the date of issue, unless indicated
<image>
otherwise.
requirements.object: date of issue

requirements.full_sentence:
Applicability
These Directions shall be applicable to Rural Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
<image>
collectively referred to as 'RCBs' and individually as an 'RCB') operating in India.
requirements.object: Co-operative Banks (hereinafter <image> collectively referred to as 'RCBs' and individually as an 'RCB') operating in India

requirements.full_sentence:
In this context, Rural Co-operative Banks shall mean State Co-operative Banks
and Central Co-operative Bank, as defined in the National Bank for Agriculture
and Rural Development Act, 1981.
requirements.object: and Central Co-operative Bank, as defined in the National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development Act, 1981

requirements.full_sentence:
Role of Board
An RCB shall put in place approved policies and review mechanisms to ensure
<image>
sound business conduct and enhanced customer service.
requirements.object: policies and review mechanisms to ensure <image> sound business conduct and enhanced customer service

requirements.full_sentence:
Customer Service: Institutional Framework
B.1 Need for Board's involvement
Matters relating to customer service shall be deliberated by the Board to ensure
<image>
that the instructions are implemented meaningfully.
requirements.object: Board to ensure <image> that the instructions are implemented meaningfully

requirements.full_sentence:
Commitment to hassle-free
service to the customer at large and the common person in particular shall be
the major responsibility of the Board.
requirements.object: of the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
B.2 Board approved policies on Customer Service
Customer service shall be projected as a priority objective of banks along with
<image>
profit, growth and fulfilment of social obligations.
requirements.object: priority objective of banks along with <image> profit, growth and fulfilment of social obligations

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall have a Board
approved policy for the following:
<image>
B.2.1 Comprehensive Deposit Policy
An RCB shall formulate a transparent and comprehensive policy setting out the
<image>
rights of the depositors in general and small depositors in particular.
requirements.object: policy for the following: <image> B

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy
shall cover all aspects of operations of deposit accounts, charges leviable and
other related issues to facilitate interaction of depositors at branch levels.
requirements.object: operations of deposit accounts, charges leviable and other related issues to facilitate interaction of depositors at branch level

requirements.full_sentence:
Such
a policy shall also be explicit regarding secrecy and confidentiality of the
customers.
requirements.object: secrecy and confidentiality of the customers

requirements.full_sentence:
B.2.2 Cheque Collection Policy
An RCB shall formulate a comprehensive and transparent policy taking into
<image>
account their technological capabilities, systems and processes adopted for
clearing arrangements and other internal arrangements for collection through
correspondents.
requirements.object: transparent policy taking into <image> account their technological capabilities, systems and processes adopted for clear

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy inter alia shall cover the following three aspects:
(1) Immediate Credit for Local / Outstation cheques
(2) Time frame for Collection of Local / Outstation Instruments
(3) Interest payment for delayed collection
B.2.3 Customer Compensation Policy
An RCB shall have a Board approved Customer Compensation Policy which
<image>
shall at a minimum, incorporate the following aspects:
(1) Erroneous Debits arising on fraudulent or other transactions,
(2) Payment of interest for delays in collection,
(3) Payment of interest for delay in issue of duplicate draft, and
(4) Other unauthorised actions of an RCB leading to a financial loss to customer
B.3 Giving publicity to the policies
An RCB shall ensure that wide publicity is given to the above policies formulated
<image>
by it by placing them prominently on the website as well as displaying them on
the notice board of its branches.
requirements.object: aspects: (1) Immediate Credit for Local / Outstation cheques (2) Time frame for Collection of Local / Outstation Instruments

requirements.full_sentence:
The RCB shall also take necessary steps to
<image>
keep the customers duly informed of the changes in the policies formulated by it
from time to time.
requirements.object: to <image> keep the customers duly informed of the changes in the policies formulated by it from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
The customers shall be clearly apprised of the assurances of
the RCB on the services provided, at the time of establishment of the initial
relationship, be it as a depositor, borrower or otherwise.
requirements.object: the assurances of the RCB on the services provided, at the time of establishment of the initial relationship, be it as a deposi

requirements.full_sentence:
B.4 Customer Service Committee of the Board
An RCB shall constitute a Customer Service Committee of the Board and include
<image>
experts and representatives of customers as invitees to enable the RCB to
formulate policies and assess the compliance thereof internally.
requirements.object: Committee of the Board and include <image> experts and representatives of customers as invitees to enable the RCB to for

requirements.full_sentence:
B.4.3 Role of the Customer Service Committee
Customer Service Committee of the Board, illustratively, shall address the
<image>
following:
(1) Formulation of a Comprehensive Deposit Policy
(2) Issues such as the treatment of death of a depositor for operations of his / her
account
(3) Product approval process with a view to suitability and appropriateness
(4) Annual survey of depositor satisfaction
(5) Triennial audit of such services.
requirements.object: (1) Formulation of a Comprehensive Deposit Policy (2) Issues such as the treatment of death of a depositor for operatio

requirements.full_sentence:
The Committee shall also examine any other issues having a bearing on the
<image>
quality of customer service rendered.
requirements.object: issues having a bearing on the <image> quality of customer service rendered

requirements.full_sentence:
B.4.4 Board Meeting to Review and Deliberate on Customer Service
A detailed memorandum reviewing customer service / customer care aspects of
<image>
an RCB shall be placed once in every six months to the Board of Directors.
requirements.object: every six months to the Board of Directors

requirements.full_sentence:
Prompt corrective action shall be initiated wherever service quality / skill gaps
are noticed.
requirements.object: quality / skill gaps are noticed

requirements.full_sentence:
B.5 Standing Committee on Customer Service
An RCB shall have a Standing Committee on Customer Service, cutting across
<image>
various departments, which shall serve as the micro level executive committee
<image>
driving the implementation process and providing relevant feedback.
requirements.object: on Customer Service, cutting across <image> various departments, which shall serve as the micro level executive committee <i

requirements.full_sentence:
The
Customer Service Committee of the Board shall oversee and review / modify the
initiatives.
requirements.object: modify the initiatives

requirements.full_sentence:
These two Committees shall be mutually reinforcing with one feeding
into the other.
requirements.object: one feeding into the other

requirements.full_sentence:
The constitution and functions of the Standing Committee shall be on the lines
<image>
indicated below:
(1) The Standing Committee shall be chaired by the Chairman or MD or CEO and
include non-officials as its members to enable an independent feedback on the
quality of customer service rendered by the RCB.
requirements.object: <image> indicated below: (1) The Standing Committee shall be chaired by the Chairman or MD or CEO and include non-officials as its mem

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The Standing Committee shall be entrusted not only with the task of ensuring
timely and effective compliance of the Reserve Bank's instructions on customer
service, but also that of receiving the necessary feedback to determine that the
actions taken by various departments of the RCB are in tune with the spirit and
intent of such instructions.
requirements.object: with the task of ensuring timely and effective compliance of the Reserve Bank's instructions on customer service, but also that

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The Standing Committee shall, on an ongoing basis, review the practices and
procedures prevalent in the RCB and take necessary corrective action.
requirements.object: basis, review the practices and procedures prevalent in the RCB and take necessary corrective action

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The Standing Committee shall submit a brief report periodically to the Customer
Service Committee of the Board on its performance during its tenure indicating,
inter alia, the areas reviewed, procedures / practices identified and simplified /
introduced.
requirements.object: periodically to the Customer Service Committee of the Board on its performance during its tenure indicating, inter alia, the are

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The Standing Committee shall act as the bridge between the various
departments of the RCB and the Board / Customer Service Committee of the
Board.
requirements.object: between the various departments of the RCB and the Board / Customer Service Committee of the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
B.6 Branch Level Customer Service Committees
An RCB shall establish Customer Service Committees at branch level, which
<image>
shall also include its customers.
requirements.object: at branch level, which <image> shall also include its customers

requirements.full_sentence:
Senior citizens, an important constituent in
banks, shall be included therein.

The Branch Level Customer Service Committee shall meet at least once a month
<image>
to study complaints/ suggestions, cases of delay, difficulties faced / reported by
<image>
customers / members of the Committee, and evolve ways and means of
improving customer service.
requirements.object: a month <image> to study complaints/ suggestions, cases of delay, difficulties faced / reported by <image> customers / members of t

requirements.full_sentence:
The Branch Level Committees shall submit quarterly reports giving inputs /
<image>
suggestions to the Standing Committee on Customer Service, thus enabling the
Standing Committee to examine them and provide relevant feedback to the
Customer Service Committee of the Board for necessary policy / procedural
action.
requirements.object: inputs / <image> suggestions to the Standing Committee on Customer Service, thus enabling the Standing Committee to ex

requirements.full_sentence:
Customer Service - Policy for general management of the branches
An RCB shall orient its systems and procedures towards providing better
<image>
customer service and shall periodically assess these systems and their impact
on customer service.
requirements.object: procedures towards providing better <image> customer service and shall periodically assess these systems and their impact on cu

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall have a Board approved policy for general
management of the branches, which shall include the following aspects:
(1) Providing infrastructure facilities by branches by bestowing particular attention to
providing adequate space, proper furniture, drinking water facilities, with specific
emphasis on pensioners, senior citizens, disabled persons, etc.

Business posters at semi-urban and rural

requirements.full_sentence:
Service at the counters
B.1 Banking hours / working days of bank branches
An RCB shall normally function for public transactions at least for four hours on

requirements.object: shorter hours as may be considered necessary

requirements.full_sentence:

No particular banking hours have been prescribed by law and an RCB may fix,
<image>
after due notice to its customers, whatever business hours are convenient to it

Sunday or to function on Sundays in addition to the normal working days, subject

paragraph 24 above.

An RCB shall give sufficient notice to the public / its customers of its intention of

shall note to avoid infringement of any other relevant local laws such as Shops

The RCB shall

have the flexibility to fix the business hours (i.e.

An RCB shall devise appropriate procedures to ensure that no counter remains

An RCB shall extend business hours for banking transactions other than cash,

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
The following non-cash transactions should be undertaken by bank during the

hours shall be notified adequately for information of the customers.

It is desirable that this facility should be restricted

undertaken during the extended working hours, through local newspapers, as

wherever necessary.
requirements.object: local clearing house, <image> wherever necessary

requirements.full_sentence:
Customer Service - General
An RCB shall make available to the customers brochures / pamphlets in regional
<image>
language / Hindi / English giving details of various schemes available and terms

requirements.object: customers brochures / pamphlets in regional <image> language / Hindi / English giving details of various schemes available and t

Such brochures may also contain, among others, do's
and don'ts for smooth handling of day-to-day banking transactions, e.g, updation

week, advantages of maintaining joint accounts and nomination, keeping the

requirements.object: do's and don'ts for smooth handling of day-to-day banking transactions, e

requirements.full_sentence:
A customer shall be made aware not only of the various schemes and services

offered by an RCB, but also about the formalities, procedures, legal requirements

mix of advertisements, literature, interface, seminars, etc.
requirements.object: only of the various schemes and services <image> offered by an RCB, but also about the formalities, procedures, legal requirements a

The RCB shall involve
its employees in all customer education programmes.

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall keep its systems and procedures in trim, by a continuous process
<image>
of introduction of new procedures that may be required and by doing away with
unwanted ones.
requirements.object: procedures in trim, by a continuous process <image> of introduction of new procedures that may be required and by doing away with

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB may subject itself to an audit approach towards their customer service
<image>
points at grassroot levels and also at policy prescription and macro levels in the
matter of extension of customer service.
requirements.object: audit approach towards their customer service <image> points at grassroot levels and also at policy prescription and macro levels

requirements.full_sentence:
Transfer of account from one branch to another
Instructions of a customer for transfer of his / her account to another branch shall
<image>
be carried out immediately on receipt of, and in accordance with, his / her
instructions.
requirements.object: immediately on receipt of, and in accordance with, his / her instructions

requirements.full_sentence:
It shall be ensured that along with the balance of the account, the
relative account opening form, specimen signatures, standing instructions, etc.,
or the master sheets wherever obtained, are also simultaneously transferred,
under an advice to the customer.
requirements.object: with the balance of the account, the relative account opening form, specimen signatures, standing instructions, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
The account transfer form with the enclosures shall be handed over to the
<image>
customer in a sealed cover if he / she so desires for delivery at the transferee
<image>
branch.
requirements.object: the <image> customer in a sealed cover if he / she so desires for delivery at the transferee <image> branch

requirements.full_sentence:
However, the transferee branch shall also be separately supplied with a
copy of the account transfer letter.
requirements.object: with a copy of the account transfer letter

requirements.full_sentence:
When a branch receives an enquiry from a customer regarding the receipt of his
<image>
/ her account on transfer from another branch, it shall take up the matter with the

requirements.object: with the transferor branch by electronic means in case it has not received the balance of the account and / or other related papers

requirements.full_sentence:
Switching banks by customers
An RCB shall ensure that depositors dissatisfied with customer service have the
<image>

requirements.full_sentence:
Guidance to Customers and Disclosure of Information
A.1 Assistance/guidance to customers
An RCB shall have "Enquiry" or "May I Help You" counters either exclusively or
<image>
combined with other duties, located near the entry point of the banking hall, at all
branches (excluding very small branches).
requirements.object: I Help You" counters either exclusively or <image> combined with other duties, located near the entry point of the banking hall

An RCB shall display the time norms for specialised business transactions
<image>
predominantly in the banking hall.
requirements.object: for specialised business transactions <image> predominantly in the banking hall

requirements.full_sentence:
A.3 Display of information by RCBs- Comprehensive Notice Board
An RCB shall adhere to the following instructions on display of information.
requirements.object: instructions on display of information

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
A.3.1 Notice Boards
The minimum size of the Notice Board may be 2 feet by 2 feet as Board of such
<image>
a size would facilitate comfortable viewing from a distance of 3 to 5 meters.
requirements.object: 2 feet as Board of such <image> a size would facilitate comfortable viewing from a distance of 3 to 5 meters

requirements.full_sentence:
An
RCB shall have a Comprehensive Notice Board to display information at its
branches as per the format given in Annex I.
requirements.object: Board to display information at its branches as per the format given in Annex I

requirements.full_sentence:
While displaying the information in the notice board, an RCB shall adhere to the
<image>
following principles:
(1) The notice board shall be updated on a periodical basis.
requirements.object: following principles: (1) The notice board shall be updated on a periodical basis

requirements.full_sentence:
It shall indicate the date
up to which it was updated (incorporated in the display board).

(2) Though the RCB shall have discretion on pattern, colour and design of the board,

requirements.object: colour and design of the board, the display shall be kept simple and readable

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The notice board shall specifically indicate wherever recent changes have been

requirements.object: changes have been done

requirements.full_sentence:
Erroneous Debits arising on fraudulent or other transactions
B.1 Vigilance by banks
An RCB shall adhere to the instructions and procedures for opening and
<image>
operating deposit accounts to safeguard against unscrupulous persons opening
accounts mainly to use them as conduit for fraudulently encashing payment
instruments.
requirements.object: and procedures for opening and <image> operating deposit accounts to safeguard against unscrupulous persons opening account

requirements.full_sentence:
However, in view of receipt of continuous complaints of fraudulent
encashment by unscrupulous persons opening deposit accounts in the name/s
similar to already established entities, resulting in erroneous and unauthorised
debit of drawers' accounts, an RCB shall remain vigilant to prevent such lapses
and issue necessary instructions to the branches / staff.
requirements.object: such lapses and issue necessary instructions to the branches / staff

conditions: In case of any fraud

if the branch is convinced that an irregularity / fraud has
been committed by its staff towards any constituent
where the RCB is at fault

where neither the RCB is at fault nor the customer is at fault but the fault
lies elsewhere in the system
requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, an RCB is advised that:
(1) In case of any fraud, if the branch is convinced that an irregularity / fraud has
been committed by its staff towards any constituent, the branch shall at once
acknowledge its liability and pay the just claim,
(2) In cases where the RCB is at fault, it shall compensate customers without demur,
and
<image>
(3) In cases where neither the RCB is at fault nor the customer is at fault but the fault
lies elsewhere in the system, then also the RCB shall compensate the customers
(up to a limit) as part of a Board approved customer relations policy.
requirements.object: liability and pay the just claim, (2) In cases where the RCB is at fault, it shall compensate customers without demur, and <im

requirements.full_sentence:
The systems and procedures in RCBs shall be designed to make customers feel
<image>
safe about carrying out electronic banking transactions.
requirements.object: customers feel <image> safe about carrying out electronic banking transactions

requirements.full_sentence:
To achieve this, an RCB
shall put in place:
(1) appropriate systems and procedures to ensure safety and security of electronic
banking transactions carried out by customers;
requirements.object: appropriate systems and procedures to ensure safety and security of electronic banking transactions carried out by customers

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
C.2 Reporting of unauthorised transactions by customers to banks
An RCB shall ask its customers to mandatorily register for SMS alerts and
<image>
wherever available, register for e-mail alerts, for electronic banking transactions.
requirements.object: mandatorily register for SMS alerts and <image> wherever available, register for e-mail alerts, for electronic banking transactio

requirements.object: the customers, while email alerts may be sent

requirements.full_sentence:
The customers shall be advised to notify their
bank of any unauthorised electronic banking transaction at the earliest after the
occurrence of such transaction and informed that the longer the time taken to
notify the RCB, the higher will be the risk of loss to the RCB / customer.
requirements.object: their bank of any unauthorised electronic banking transaction at the earliest after the occurrence of such transaction and inform

requirements.full_sentence:
To
facilitate this, the RCB shall provide customers with 24x7 access through multiple
channels (at a minimum, via website, phone banking, SMS, e-mail, IVR, a
dedicated toll-free helpline, reporting to home branch, etc.) for reporting

instrument such as card, etc.
requirements.object: access through multiple channels (at a minimum, via website, phone banking, SMS, e-mail, IVR, a dedicated toll-free helpli

respond by "Reply" to the SMS and e-mail alerts and the customers shall not be

any.

requirements.full_sentence:

immediate response (including auto response) is sent to the customers

requirements.full_sentence:

communication systems used by banks to send alerts and receive their
responses thereto shall record the time and date of delivery of the message and

requirements.object: date of delivery of the message and receipt of customer's response

requirements.full_sentence:
This shall be important in
determining the extent of a customer's liability.
requirements.object: the extent of a customer's liability

The RCB shall not offer facility of
electronic transactions, other than ATM cash withdrawals, to customers who do
not provide mobile numbers to it.
requirements.object: transactions, other than ATM cash withdrawals, to customers who do not provide mobile numbers to it

requirements.full_sentence:
On receipt of report of an unauthorised

<image>
not operating the account
requirements.full_sentence:
In case any response is received from the account holder giving the reasons for
<image>
not operating the account, an RCB shall continue to classify the account as
operative for one more year and the account holder shall be advised to operate
the account within a period of one year (herein after referred to as 'extended
period').
requirements.object: account as operative for one more year and the account holder shall be advised to operate the account within a period of one

conditions:
In case the account holder still fails to operate the account within the
<image>
extended period
requirements.full_sentence:
In case the account holder still fails to operate the account within the
<image>
extended period, the RCB shall classify the said account as inoperative account
after the expiry of the extended period.
requirements.object: as inoperative account after the expiry of the extended period

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of classifying an account as 'inoperative', only customer induced
<image>
transactions and not bank induced transactions shall be considered.

There may
be instances where the customer has given a mandate like Standing Instructions
(SI)/ auto-renewal instructions and there are no other operations in the Savings
/Current account or the Term Deposit.
requirements.object: customer has given a mandate like Standing Instructions (SI)/ auto-renewal instructions and there are no other operations in th

requirements.full_sentence:
These transactions shall also be treated
as customer induced transactions.
requirements.object: customer induced transactions

requirements.full_sentence:
The classification of an account as inoperative shall be for a particular account
<image>
of the customer and not with reference to the customer.
requirements.object: account <image> of the customer and not with reference to the customer

conditions:
In case a customer is
maintaining multiple accounts/deposits with a bank
requirements.full_sentence:
In case a customer is
maintaining multiple accounts/deposits with a bank, all such accounts / deposits
shall be assessed individually for the purpose of classifying them as inoperative
account / unclaimed deposit, as the case may be.
requirements.object: the purpose of classifying them as inoperative account / unclaimed deposit, as the case may be

requirements.full_sentence:
In case the account holder is not carrying out transaction and the account is
<image>
inoperative due to shifting of primary account to another bank, the account holder
may be requested to provide the details of the new bank account with
authorisation to enable the RCB to transfer the balance from the existing bank
account.
requirements.object: the details of the new bank account with authorisation to enable the RCB to transfer the balance from the existing bank accoun

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall, based on the purpose of opening of the account, segregate
the aforementioned accounts in its CBS, so that the stipulation of 'inoperative'
account is not applicable to these accounts due to their non-operation for a period
of more than two years.
requirements.object: purpose of opening of the account, segregate the aforementioned accounts in its CBS, so that the stipulation of 'inoperative' account i

requirements.full_sentence:
To avoid the risk of fraud, etc., in such accounts, while
allowing operations in these accounts, the RCB shall exercise due diligence as
per the extant instructions.
requirements.object: per the extant instructions

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
B.3 Segregation and Audit of Inoperative Accounts/ Unclaimed Deposits
The segregation of inoperative accounts is required to be done to reduce the risk
<image>
of frauds.
requirements.object: reduce the risk <image> of frauds

requirements.full_sentence:
The transactions in inoperative accounts, which have been reactivated,
shall be monitored regularly, for at least six months, at higher levels (i.e., by
controlling authorities of the concerned branch) without the knowledge and notice
of the customers and the dealing staff.
requirements.object: at least six months, at higher levels (i

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall ensure that amounts lying in inoperative accounts / unclaimed
<image>
deposits and reactivated inoperative accounts/ unclaimed deposits, are
subjected to concurrent audit.
requirements.object: in inoperative accounts / unclaimed <image> deposits and reactivated inoperative accounts/ unclaimed deposits, are subjected

requirements.full_sentence:
B.4 Tracing of Customers of Inoperative Accounts/ Unclaimed Deposits
An RCB shall contact the holder(s) of the inoperative account/ unclaimed deposit
<image>
through letters, email or SMS (if the email and mobile number are registered with
the RCB).
requirements.object: the inoperative account/ unclaimed deposit <image> through letters, email or SMS (if the email and mobile number are register

requirements.full_sentence: The email / SMS shall be sent on a quarterly basis.
requirements.object: quarterly basis

conditions:
In case the whereabouts of the holder(s) of the minimum balance account/
<image>
unclaimed deposit are not traceable
requirements.full_sentence:
In case the whereabouts of the holder(s) of the minimum balance account/
<image>
unclaimed deposit are not traceable, the RCB shall contact the introducer, if any,
who had introduced the account holder to the RCB at the time of opening of the
account.

conditions: if registered
requirements.full_sentence:
The RCB shall also contact the nominee, if registered, for tracing the
customer.

An RCB shall undertake special drives periodically to find out the whereabouts
<image>
of the customers, their nominees or legal heirs in respect of inoperative accounts
/ unclaimed deposits.
requirements.object: to find out the whereabouts <image> of the customers, their nominees or legal heirs in respect of inoperative ac

requirements.full_sentence:
B.5 Activation of Inoperative Accounts
An RCB shall make available the facility of updation of KYC for activation of
<image>
inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits at all branches (including non-home
branches).
requirements.object: of updation of KYC for activation of <image> inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits at all branches (including non-home

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the RCB shall endeavour to provide the facility of updation of
KYC in such accounts and deposits through Video-Customer Identification
Process (V-CIP).
requirements.object: facility of updation of KYC in such accounts and deposits through Video-Customer Identification Process (V-CIP)

requirements.full_sentence:
The V-CIP related instructions under Reserve Bank of India
(Rural Co-operative Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025 shall be
adhered to by the RCB.
requirements.object: the RCB

conditions:
if requested by the account
holder
requirements.full_sentence:
Additionally, the services of an authorised Business
Correspondent of the RCB may be utilized for activation of inoperative accounts
<image>
as prescribed in these Directions and through V-CIP if requested by the account
holder, subject to the facility of V-CIP being provided by the RCB.
requirements.object: of inoperative accounts <image> as prescribed in these Directions and through V-CIP if requested by the account holder

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall activate the inoperative accounts/ unclaimed deposits, including
<image>
those which are under freeze by orders of various agencies like Courts,
Tribunals, Law Enforcement Agencies, only after adhering to the KYC
instructions provided in the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks -
Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025 such as Customer Due Diligence (CDD),
customer identification, risk categorisation, etc.
requirements.object: unclaimed deposits, including <image> those which are under freeze by orders of various agencies like Courts, Tribu

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall ensure that activation of inoperative account / unclaimed deposits
<image>
in CBS necessarily requires second level of authorisation by another officer at
the same or higher level (i.e., through maker and checker).
requirements.object: inoperative account / unclaimed deposits <image> in CBS necessarily requires second level of authorisation by another office

requirements.full_sentence:
System logs shall
invariably be maintained in case of any activity in or activation of inoperative
accounts/unclaimed deposits for concurrent audit purpose.
requirements.object: case of any activity in or activation of inoperative accounts/unclaimed deposits for concurrent audit purpose

requirements.full_sentence:
The preservation
period of such system logs shall be as per the internal guidelines of an RCB.
requirements.object: internal guidelines of an RCB

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall automatically intimate the inoperative account/ unclaimed deposit
<image>
holders though SMS and registered email stating that on the basis of the KYC
documents submitted by them, the inoperative status of the account has been
removed.
requirements.object: account/ unclaimed deposit <image> holders though SMS and registered email stating that on the basis of the KYC

requirements.full_sentence:
The intimation shall also mention the remedial measures available to
them to report unauthorised access, if any.
requirements.object: measures available to them to report unauthorised access

requirements.full_sentence:
The RCB shall have in place adequate operational
safeguards to ensure that the claimants in case of inoperative accounts/
unclaimed deposits are genuine.
requirements.object: operational safeguards to ensure that the claimants in case of inoperative accounts/ unclaimed deposits are genuine

requirements.full_sentence:
The RCB shall process requests for activation
of inoperative account/ unclaimed deposits within three working days from the
receipt of the complete application.
requirements.object: of inoperative account/ unclaimed deposits within three working days from the receipt of the complete application

requirements.full_sentence:
B.6 Payment of Interest
Interest on savings accounts shall be credited on a regular basis irrespective of
<image>
the fact that the account is in operation or not.
requirements.object: regular basis irrespective of <image> the fact that the account is in operation or not

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
B.7 Levy of Charges
An RCB shall not levy penal charges for non-maintenance of minimum balances
<image>
in any account that is classified as an inoperative account.
requirements.object: non-maintenance of minimum balances <image> in any account that is classified as an inoperative account

requirements.full_sentence: No charges shall be levied for activation of inoperative accounts.
requirements.object: of inoperative accounts

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
B.8 Display of Unclaimed Deposits and Search Facility
An RCB shall host the details of unclaimed deposits {only name, address (without
<image>
pin code) and Unclaimed Deposit Reference Number (UDRN)}, which have been
transferred to DEA Fund of RBI on their respective websites, which shall be
updated regularly, at least on a monthly basis.
requirements.object: unclaimed deposits {only name, address (without <image> pin code) and Unclaimed Deposit Reference Number (UDRN)}, which have been

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB, which does not have its
own website shall make available the above list of unclaimed deposits in their
respective branches.
requirements.object: list of unclaimed deposits in their respective branches

requirements.full_sentence:
The database hosted on the website shall provide a search
option to enable the public to search for their unclaimed deposits using name in
combination with the address of the account holder/ entity.
requirements.object: to enable the public to search for their unclaimed deposits using name in combination with the address of the account holder/

requirements.full_sentence:
Upon a successful
search, details of unclaimed deposits shall be displayed in a format comprising
account holder's name(s), his/her address (without pincode) and UDRN only.
requirements.object: format comprising account holder's name(s), his/her address (without pincode) and UDRN only

requirements.full_sentence:
In
case such accounts are not in the name of individuals, the search input and result
should include names of individuals authorised to operate the accounts.
requirements.object: authorised to operate the accounts

requirements.full_sentence:
However, the account number, its type, outstanding balance and the name of the
branch shall not be disclosed on the RCB's website.
requirements.object: RCB's website

requirements.full_sentence:
B.9 Fraud Risk Management in Inoperative Accounts
An RCB shall not allow any debit transaction in an inoperative account unless
<image>
there is a customer induced activation as per the procedure mentioned in
paragraphs 184 to 187 above.
requirements.object: in an inoperative account unless <image> there is a customer induced activation as per the procedure mentioned in paragrap

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, an RCB shall also consider imposing a
cooling-off period on reactivation, with restrictions on the number and amount of
transactions, as may be applicable for newly opened accounts with the RCB.
requirements.object: cooling-off period on reactivation, with restrictions on the number and amount of transactions, as may be applicable for newl

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall ensure that there is no unauthorised access to customer data
<image>
pertaining to the inoperative accounts.
requirements.object: no unauthorised access to customer data <image> pertaining to the inoperative accounts

requirements.full_sentence:
The RCB shall also ensure that adequate
steps are taken to prevent data theft and related misuse for fraudulent purposes.
requirements.object: steps are taken to prevent data theft and related misuse for fraudulent purposes

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
B.10 Customer Awareness
An RCB shall provide on their website as well as at their branches, the
<image>
information on the process for activation of the inoperative account/ unclaimed
deposits and claiming the balances therein.
requirements.object: as well as at their branches, the <image> information on the process for activation of the inoperative account/ unclaimed dep

requirements.full_sentence:
Necessary claim forms and
documents may be made available for the benefit of customers.
requirements.object: the benefit of customers

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall conduct public awareness and financial literacy campaigns
<image>
regularly to educate the members of public about the activation of inoperative
accounts / unclaimed deposits and the prescribed procedure to claim amounts
lying therein by a depositor or his/her nominee / legal heir in case of deceased
depositor.
requirements.object: financial literacy campaigns <image> regularly to educate the members of public about the activation of inoperative accou

requirements.full_sentence:
Safe Deposit Locker / Safe Custody Article Facility
C.1 Board approved policies and SOPs
An RCB shall put in place a comprehensive revised Board approved policy and
<image>
SOPs on safe deposit locker facility / safe custody article as per the instructions
mentioned herein.
requirements.object: comprehensive revised Board approved policy and <image> SOPs on safe deposit locker facility / safe custody article as per the instruct

requirements.full_sentence:
C.2 Allotment of Lockers
C.2.1 Customer Due Diligence (CDD) for Lockers
The existing customers of a bank who have made an application for locker facility
<image>
and who are fully compliant with the CDD criteria under the Reserve Bank of
India (Rural Co-operative Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025 may
be given the facilities of safe deposit lockers / safe custody article subject to on-
going compliance.
requirements.object: of safe deposit lockers / safe custody article subject to on- going compliance

requirements.full_sentence:
Customers who are not having any other banking relationship with the RCB may
<image>
be given the facilities of safe deposit locker / safe custody article after complying
with the CDD criteria under the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks
- Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025 and subject to on-going compliance.
requirements.object: facilities of safe deposit locker / safe custody article after complying with the CDD criteria under the Reserve Bank of India (R

requirements.full_sentence:
The due diligence shall be carried out for all the customers in whatever rights
and capacities they may be hiring the locker.
requirements.object: all the customers in whatever rights and capacities they may be hiring the locker

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
An RCB shall incorporate a clause in the locker agreement that the locker-hirer/s
<image>
shall not keep anything illegal or any hazardous substance in the Safe Deposit
locker.
requirements.object: any hazardous substance in the Safe Deposit locker

conditions:
If an RCB suspects the deposit of any illegal or hazardous substance by
any customer in the safe deposit locker
requirements.full_sentence:
If an RCB suspects the deposit of any illegal or hazardous substance by
any customer in the safe deposit locker, the RCB shall have the right to take
appropriate action against such customer as it deems fit and proper in the
circumstances.
requirements.object: take appropriate action against such customer as it deems fit and proper in the circumstances

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall obtain recent passport size photographs of locker-hirer(s) and
<image>
individual(s) authorised by locker hirer(s) to operate the locker and preserve in
the records pertaining to locker-hirer being maintained in the RCB's branch.
requirements.object: photographs of locker-hirer(s) and <image> individual(s) authorised by locker hirer(s) to operate the locker and preserve

requirements.full_sentence:
C.2.2 Locker Allotment
In order to facilitate customers making informed choices, an RCB shall maintain
<image>
a branch wise list of vacant lockers as well as a waitlist in Core Banking System
(CBS) or any other computerised system compliant with Cyber Security
Framework issued by RBI, for the purpose of allotment of lockers and ensure
transparency in allotment of lockers.
requirements.object: wise list of vacant lockers as well as a waitlist in Core Banking System (CBS) or any other computerised system compliant wi

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall acknowledge the receipt of all
applications for allotment of locker and provide a waitlist number to the
customers, if the lockers are not available for allotment.
requirements.object: all applications for allotment of locker and provide a waitlist number to the customers

requirements.full_sentence:
C.2.3 Model Locker Agreement
An RCB shall have a Board approved agreement for safe deposit lockers.
requirements.object: agreement for safe deposit lockers

requirements.full_sentence:
For
<image>
this purpose, an RCB may adopt the model locker agreement framed by IBA.
requirements.object: agreement framed by IBA

requirements.full_sentence:
The agreement shall be in conformity with these instructions and the directions
of the Hon'ble Supreme Court in the matter of 'Amitabha Dasgupta vs United
Bank of India' (Judgment dated February 19, 2021 in CA No.
requirements.object: these instructions and the directions of the Hon'ble Supreme Court in the matter of 'Amitabha Dasgupta vs United Bank of India'

requirements.full_sentence:
An
RCB shall ensure that any unfair terms or conditions are not incorporated in their
locker agreements.
requirements.object: terms or conditions are not incorporated in their locker agreements

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the terms of the contract shall not be more onerous
than required in ordinary course of business to safeguard the interests of the
RCB.
requirements.object: required in ordinary course of business to safeguard the interests of the RCB

requirements.full_sentence:
At the time of allotment of the locker to a customer, an RCB shall enter into an
<image>
agreement with the customer to whom the locker facility is provided, on a paper
duly stamped.
requirements.object: agreement with the customer to whom the locker facility is provided, on a paper duly stamped

requirements.full_sentence:
A copy of the locker agreement in duplicate signed by both the
parties shall be furnished to the locker-hirer to know his / her rights and
<image>
responsibilities.
requirements.object: locker-hirer to know his / her rights and <image> responsibilities

requirements.full_sentence:
Original Agreement shall be retained with the RCB's branch
where the locker is situated.
requirements.object: RCB's branch where the locker is situated

requirements.full_sentence:
There may be instances, where the agreements already executed by an RCB
<image>
with its locker-hirer(s) are at variance with the IBA Model Agreement.

In such
cases, all the provisions contained in this section, in particular paragraphs 236
to 238 below on compensation policy / liability of RCBs, shall continue to apply
to them even if not explicitly stated in the agreements already executed.
requirements.object: them even if not explicitly stated in the agreements already executed

requirements.full_sentence:
Further,
in such cases, the RCB shall have the option to execute fresh agreements or
revise them through supplementary agreements.
requirements.object: execute fresh agreements or revise them through supplementary agreements

requirements.full_sentence:
The cost of stamp paper in
such cases shall be borne by the RCB.
requirements.object: RCB

requirements.full_sentence:
C.2.4 Locker Rent
An RCB may face potential situations where the locker-hirer neither operates the
<image>
locker nor pays the rent.
requirements.object: the locker-hirer neither operates the <image> locker nor pays the rent

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB, however, shall not insist on such term deposits from the
existing locker holders or those who have satisfactory operative account.
requirements.object: deposits from the existing locker holders or those who have satisfactory operative account

conditions: If locker rent is collected in advance
requirements.full_sentence:
If locker rent is collected in advance, in the event of surrender of a locker by a
<image>
customer, the proportionate amount of advance rent collected shall be refunded
to the customer.
requirements.object: customer

conditions:
If there is any event such as merger / closure / shifting of branch warranting
<image>
physical relocation of the lockers
requirements.full_sentence:
If there is any event such as merger / closure / shifting of branch warranting
<image>
physical relocation of the lockers, an RCB shall give public notice in two
newspapers (including one local daily in vernacular language) in this regard and
<image>
the customers shall be intimated at least two months in advance along with
options for them to change or close the facility.
requirements.object: two newspapers (including one local daily in vernacular language) in this regard and <image> the customers shall be intimated at

conditions:
In case of unplanned shifting due
to natural calamities or any other such emergency situation
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of unplanned shifting due
to natural calamities or any other such emergency situation, the RCB shall make
efforts to intimate its customers suitably at the earliest.
requirements.object: its customers suitably at the earliest

requirements.full_sentence:
C.3 Infrastructure and Security Standards
C.3.1 Security of the Strong Room / Vault
An RCB shall take necessary steps to ensure that the area in which the locker
<image>
facility is housed is properly secured to prevent criminal break-ins.
requirements.object: ensure that the area in which the locker <image> facility is housed is properly secured to prevent criminal break-ins

requirements.full_sentence:
The risks of
accessibility of an allotted locker from any side without involvement of the locker-
hirer concerned may be assessed and kept on record.
requirements.object: on record

requirements.full_sentence:
The RCB shall have a
single defined point of entry and exit to the locker room / vault.
requirements.object: point of entry and exit to the locker room / vault

requirements.full_sentence:
The place where
the lockers are housed must be secured enough to protect against hazard of rain
/ flood water entering and damaging the lockers in contingent situations.
requirements.object: protect against hazard of rain / flood water entering and damaging the lockers in contingent situations

requirements.full_sentence:
The fire
hazard risks of the area should also be assessed and minimized.
requirements.object: minimized

requirements.full_sentence:
The RCB, as
per its policy, shall conduct necessary engineering / safety verification regularly
to identify the risks and carry out necessary rectification.
requirements.object: safety verification regularly to identify the risks and carry out necessary rectification

requirements.full_sentence: The area housing the lockers shall remain adequately guarded at all times.
requirements.object: all times

conditions: if required as per its risk assessment
requirements.full_sentence:
An
<image>
RCB shall install Access Control system, if required as per its risk assessment,
which would restrict any unauthorised entry and create digital record of access
to locker room with time log.

As per its internal security policy, bank may cover
the entry and exit of the strong room and the common areas of operation under
CCTV camera and preserve its recording for a period of not less than 180 days.
requirements.object: exit of the strong room and the common areas of operation under CCTV camera and preserve its recording for a period of not less th

conditions:
In case any customer has complained to an RCB that his/her locker is opened
without his/her knowledge and authority
requirements.full_sentence:
In case any customer has complained to an RCB that his/her locker is opened
without his/her knowledge and authority, or any theft or security breach is
noticed/observed, the RCB shall preserve the CCTV recording till the police
investigation is completed and the dispute is settled.
requirements.object: till the police investigation is completed and the dispute is settled

requirements.full_sentence:
The security procedures shall be well documented and the staff concerned shall
<image>
be properly trained in the procedure.
requirements.object: the staff concerned shall <image> be properly trained in the procedure

requirements.full_sentence:
The internal auditors shall verify and report
the compliance to ensure that the procedures are strictly adhered to.
requirements.object: compliance to ensure that the procedures are strictly adhered to

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
C.3.2 Locker Standards
All the new mechanical lockers to be installed by an RCB shall conform to basic
<image>
standards / benchmarks for safety and security as prescribed by Bureau of Indian
Standards (BIS) or any other enhanced industry standards applicable in this
regard.
requirements.object: standards / benchmarks for safety and security as prescribed by Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) or any other enhanced indust

conditions: In case the lockers are being operated through an electronic system
requirements.full_sentence:
In case the lockers are being operated through an electronic system, an RCB
<image>
shall take reasonable steps to ensure that the system is protected against
hacking or any breach of security.
requirements.object: ensure that the system is protected against hacking or any breach of security

requirements.full_sentence:
The customers' personal data, including their
biometric data, shall not be shared with third parties without their consent.
requirements.object: parties without their consent

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, an RCB shall ensure that the electronically operated lockers are
compliant with the Cyber Security Framework prescribed by the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: operated lockers are compliant with the Cyber Security Framework prescribed by the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence: The system shall be capable of maintaining unalterable log of locker activities.
requirements.object: unalterable log of locker activities

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall comply with the relevant statutory / regulatory instructions /
requirements applicable for IT / data protection.
requirements.object: statutory / regulatory instructions / requirements applicable for IT / data protection

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, an RCB shall also
devise a standard operating procedure for issue of new password in lieu of lost
passwords to customers in a safe and secure manner in case of electronically
operated lockers.
requirements.object: operating procedure for issue of new password in lieu of lost passwords to customers in a safe and secure manner in case of ele

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall ensure that identification Code of the RCB / branch is embossed
<image>
on all the locker keys with a view to facilitating identification of lockers / locker
ownership by law enforcement agencies in case of need.
requirements.object: of the RCB / branch is embossed <image> on all the locker keys with a view to facilitating identification of lockers /

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the custodian
of the locker shall, regularly/periodically, check the keys maintained in the branch
to ensure that they are in proper condition.
requirements.object: keys maintained in the branch to ensure that they are in proper condition

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall permit the locker-hirer
to operate the locker only with the key provided by the RCB, although there is no
restriction in allowing the customer to use an additional padlock of her / his own
if there are such provisions in lockers.
requirements.object: operate the locker only with the key provided by the RCB, although there is no restriction in allowing the customer to use

requirements.full_sentence:
C.4 Locker Operations
C.4.1 Regular Operations by Customers
The locker hirer and/or the persons duly authorised by him/ her only shall be
<image>
permitted to operate the locker after proper verification of their identity and
recording of the authorization by the officials concerned of the RCB.
requirements.object: operate the locker after proper verification of their identity and recording of the authorization by the officials concerned o

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB
shall maintain a record of all individuals, including the locker-hirers, who have
<image>
accessed the lockers and the date and time (both check-in and check-out time)
on which they have opened and closed the locker and obtain their signature.
requirements.object: all individuals, including the locker-hirers, who have <image> accessed the lockers and the date and time (both check-in and chec

requirements.full_sentence:
The
ingress and egress register for access to Vault Room by locker-hirers or any
other individual including the RCBs' staff shall be maintained to record the
movement of individuals in the Vault Room area with their signatures at
appropriate place in the records.
requirements.object: the movement of individuals in the Vault Room area with their signatures at appropriate place in the records

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB's officer authorising the locker-hirer to access the locker, after unlocking
<image>
the first key / password shall not remain present when the locker is opened by
the locker-hirer.
requirements.object: locker is opened by the locker-hirer

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall ensure that there is adequate privacy to the locker-
hirers in the operations when customers access the lockers at the same time.
requirements.object: adequate privacy to the locker- hirers in the operations when customers access the lockers at the same time

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall send an email and SMS alert to the registered email address and
<image>
mobile number of the customer before the end of the day as a positive
confirmation intimating the date and time of the locker operation and the
redressal mechanism available in case of unauthorized locker access.
requirements.object: SMS alert to the registered email address and <image> mobile number of the customer before the end of the day as a positive confirma

requirements.full_sentence:
C.4.2 Internal Controls by RCBs
There shall be a system of inter change of locks whenever the locker is
<image>
surrendered by the hirer.
requirements.object: inter change of locks whenever the locker is <image> surrendered by the hirer

requirements.full_sentence:
The keys of vacant lockers shall be kept in sealed
envelopes.

E.1 Settlement of Claims in Deposit Accounts of Deceased Depositor
E.1.1 Deposit Accounts with Nominee / Survivorship clause
A deposit account where a depositor had made nomination in terms of the
<image>
provisions of The Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or where the account was
opened with survivorship clause, the payment of the outstanding balance upon
the death of the depositor(s) to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) shall be considered
a valid discharge of an RCB's liability, provided:
(1) The RCB has exercised due care and caution in establishing the identity of the
nominee(s)/ survivor(s) and the deceased status of the account holder(s) by
obtaining appropriate documentary evidence (physical or equivalent e-
document);
requirements.object: discharge of an RCB's liability

and

be receiving the payment from the RCB as a trustee of the legal heirs of the

claim which any person may have against the nominee(s)/ survivor(s) to the
extent of the payment made to them.

E.1.2 Deposit Accounts without Nominee / Survivorship clause
E.1.2.1 Simplified Procedure
Keeping in view the imperative need to avoid inconvenience and undue hardship
<image>

settlement of claims in respect of deposit accounts where the aggregate amount
payable, including accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less than
the threshold limit, provided
(1) a deceased depositor(s) had not made any nomination or in case of a joint
account, the account was without nominee / survivorship clause,
(2) there is no Will left behind by the deceased depositor(s),
(3) there is no contesting claim, and
(4) there is no order from a competent court in the knowledge of the RCB, restraining
the claimant(s) from receiving nor the RCB from making the payment.

Keeping in view the imperative need to avoid inconvenience and undue hardship

requirements.full_sentence:
Reset of Floating Interest Rate on Equated Monthly Instalments (EMI) based
Personal Loans
An RCB shall put in place an appropriate policy framework meeting the following
<image>
requirements for implementation and compliance:
(1) At the time of sanction, the RCB shall clearly communicate to the borrower about
the possible impact of change in benchmark interest rate on the loan leading to
changes in EMI and / or tenor or both.
requirements.object: appropriate policy framework meeting the following <image> requirements for implementation and compliance: (1) At the time of sanction

requirements.full_sentence:
Subsequently, any increase in the EMI /
tenor or both on account of the above shall be communicated to the borrower
immediately through appropriate channels.
requirements.object: borrower immediately through appropriate channels

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) At the time of reset of interest rates, the RCB may, at its option, provide a choice
to the borrower to switch over to a fixed rate as per its Board approved policy.
requirements.object: provide a choice to the borrower to switch over to a fixed rate as per its Board approved policy

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy, inter alia, may also specify the number of times a borrower will be
allowed to switch during the tenor of the loan.
requirements.object: of times a borrower will be allowed to switch during the tenor of the loan

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The borrowers shall also be given the choice to opt for (i) enhancement in EMI
or elongation of tenor or for a combination of both options;
requirements.object: choice to opt for (i) enhancement in EMI or elongation of tenor or for a combination of both options

requirements.full_sentence:

charges / pre-payment penalty shall be subject to extant instructions.

conditions:

requirements.full_sentence:
Pre-payment charges on loans
In case of existing floating rate term loans sanctioned to individual borrowers on
<image>
or before December 31, 2025, an RCB shall not levy pre-payment charges.

An RCB shall adhere to the following directions regarding levy of pre-payment
<image>
charges on loans and advances (term loans as well as demand loans) sanctioned
or renewed on or after January 1, 2026.
requirements.object: directions regarding levy of pre-payment <image> charges on loans and advances (term loans as well as demand loans) sanctioned

requirements.full_sentence:
(1) For all floating rate loans granted for purposes other than business to individuals,
with or without co-obligant(s), an RCB shall not levy pre-payment charges.

(2) For all floating rate loans with sanctioned amount / limit up to ₹50 lakh granted
for business purpose to individuals and Micro and Small Enterprises (as defined
in Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development (MSMED) Act, 2006), with
or without co-obligant(s), an RCB shall not levy pre-payment charges.

(3) The Directions at paragraph 313(1) and 313(2) above shall be applicable
irrespective of the source of funds used for pre-payment of loans, either in part
or in full, and without any minimum lock-in period.
requirements.object: the source of funds used for pre-payment of loans, either in part or in full, and without any minimum lock-in period

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) In cases other than those mentioned at paragraphs 313(1) and 313(2) above,
pre-payment charges, if any, shall be as per the approved policy of the RCB.
requirements.object: approved policy of the RCB

conditions: in case of term loans
if levied by the RCB

be based on the amount being prepaid.
requirements.object: amount being prepaid

requirements.full_sentence:

pre-payment charges on closure of the facility before the due date shall be levied
on an amount not exceeding the sanctioned limit.
requirements.object: amount not exceeding the sanctioned limit

conditions: In case of cash credit / overdraft facilities
requirements.full_sentence:

applicable if the borrower intimates the RCB of his / her / its intention not to renew
the facility before the period as stipulated in the loan agreement, provided that
the facility gets closed on the due date.
requirements.object: borrower intimates the RCB of his / her / its intention not to renew the facility before the period as stipulated in the loan agreement

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(7) An RCB shall not levy any charges where pre-payment is effected at the instance
of the RCB.
requirements.object: pre-payment is effected at the instance of the RCB

any, for delayed payment shall be applied on the overdue amount and not on the
